title: Gambler
description: This mod adds a gambling mechanic!
body:
With this mod, you can use your emeralds to convert them into Money!

With the money, you can gamble them with your gear for enchantments

 

(This mod was made as a joke, don't gamble in real life, it's a scam -_-)

 

For every 10 money you use = 1 enchantment with a max of 6

Every enchantment is restricted on the gear you gamble!

 

Have fun!
